title: collinsia parviflora var. diehlii
intro: Collinsia parviflora var. diehlii, also known as Diehl's blue eyed Mary, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Collinsia parviflora var. diehlii include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and provide relief from coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
